message:
Simplify Platform TLS section wording

Focus on what the user needs (node-to-platform connection) rather
than implementation details (platform plugin).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -260,9 +260,9 @@ customization points.
 
 ### Platform TLS Configuration
 
-The platform plugin supports plugin-specific TLS configuration for connections
-to the Tenzir Platform. These settings take precedence over the node-level
-`tenzir.tls.*` settings, but fall back to them if not specified.
+When connecting a node to the Tenzir Platform, you can configure TLS settings
+specifically for this connection. These settings take precedence over the
+node-level `tenzir.tls.*` settings, but fall back to them if not specified.
 
 {% aside type="note" title="Use Only When Required" %}
 We do not recommend manually configuring TLS settings unless required for
